```{r supplemental_tables}
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, " " = 1, "Status 4 Composition" = 2, "LVAD Prevalence" = 2))

# ============================================================================
# STAR COMBINED TABLE (Waitlist + Status 4 + LVAD Prevalence)
# ============================================================================

star_combined_table <- star_combined_plot_data %>%
  select(date, date_label, total_status4, status4_with_lvad, total_with_lvad) %>%
  left_join(
    star_prevalence_df %>%
      select(date, total_waitlist, lvad_proportion) %>%
      mutate(lvad_proportion = round(lvad_proportion, 2)),
    by = "date"
  ) %>%
  select(
    Date = date_label,
    `Total Waitlist` = total_waitlist,
    `Total Status 4` = total_status4,
    `Status 4 with LVAD` = status4_with_lvad,
    `Total LVAD Prevalence` = total_with_lvad,
    `LVAD %` = lvad_proportion
  )

star_combined_html <- kable(star_combined_table, format = "html",
                            caption = "Table: STAR Status 4 Composition and LVAD Prevalence") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover", "condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE, font_size = 11) %>%
  add_header_above(c(" " = 1, " " = 1, "Status 4 Composition" = 2, "LVAD Prevalence" = 2))
```


# Table 1: Baseline Characteristics (No Statistical Tests)
```{r table1}
library(gtsummary)
library(labelled)

# Define LVAD keywords
lvad_keywords <- c("heartmate", "hm", "lionheart", "arrow", "jarvik", "micromed", 
                   "debakey", "novacor", "evaheart", "worldheart", "levacor", 
                   "reliantheart", "hvad", "heartsaver")

# ============================================================================
# PREPARE SRTR TABLE 1 DATA
# ============================================================================

srtr_table1 <- srtr_lvad_outcomes %>%
  select(PX_ID, lvad_implant_date) %>%
  left_join(
    cand_thor2025q2 %>%
      select(PX_ID, CAN_GENDER, CAN_RACE, CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR, 
             CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING, CAN_BMI, CAN_ABO, 
             CAN_DGN, CAN_PRIMARY_PAY, CAN_LISTING_DT),
    by = "PX_ID"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    thor_support_device %>%
      filter(DeviceTypeId == 12 & VentricularSupportId == 1) %>%
      group_by(PX_ID) %>%
      arrange(ImplantDt) %>%
      slice(1) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      select(PX_ID, VadBrandId),
    by = "PX_ID"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    data_source = "SRTR",
    age_at_listing = floor(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12),
    age_at_lvad = floor(CAN_AGE_IN_MONTHS_AT_LISTING / 12) + 
      as.numeric(difftime(lvad_implant_date, CAN_LISTING_DT, units = "days")) / 365.25,
    age_at_lvad = floor(age_at_lvad),
    sex = ifelse(CAN_GENDER == "M", "Male", "Female"),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    race = case_when(
      is.na(CAN_RACE) & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "LATINO" ~ "Hispanic/Latino",
      CAN_RACE == 8 & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "NLATIN" ~ "White",
      CAN_RACE == 16 & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "NLATIN" ~ "Black",
      CAN_RACE == 64 & CAN_ETHNICITY_SRTR == "NLATIN" ~ "Asian",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    race = factor(race, levels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic/Latino", "Asian", "Other")),
    bmi_categories = case_when(
      CAN_BMI < 18 ~ "Underweight",
      CAN_BMI >= 18 & CAN_BMI < 25 ~ "Normal",
      CAN_BMI >= 25 & CAN_BMI < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      CAN_BMI >= 30 ~ "Obese",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"),
    bmi_categories = factor(bmi_categories, levels = c("Normal", "Underweight", "Overweight", "Obese", "Unknown")),
    blood_type = factor(
      case_when(
        CAN_ABO %in% c("A", "A1", "A2") ~ "A",
        CAN_ABO %in% c("A1B", "A2B") ~ "AB",
        TRUE ~ CAN_ABO)),
    diagnosis = case_when(
      CAN_DGN > 999 & CAN_DGN < 1007 ~ "Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic",
      CAN_DGN == 1007 | CAN_DGN == 1200 ~ "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy",
      CAN_DGN > 1048 & CAN_DGN < 1100 ~ "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
      CAN_DGN == 1203 | (CAN_DGN >= 1205 & CAN_DGN <= 1207) ~ "Congenital Heart Disease",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    diagnosis = factor(diagnosis, levels = c("Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic", "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy", 
                                             "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy", "Congenital Heart Disease", "Other")),
    payor = case_when(
      CAN_PRIMARY_PAY %in% c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 13) ~ "Public",
      CAN_PRIMARY_PAY == 1 ~ "Private",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    payor = factor(payor, levels = c("Private", "Public", "Other")),
    lvad_type = case_when(
      VadBrandId %in% c('236', '330') ~ "HeartMate 3",
      VadBrandId %in% c('205', '313') ~ "HeartMate II",
      VadBrandId %in% c('224', '316') ~ "HVAD",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    lvad_type = factor(lvad_type, levels = c("HeartMate 3", "HeartMate II", "HVAD", "Other"))
  )

cat("SRTR Table 1 data prepared:", nrow(srtr_table1), "patients\n")

# ============================================================================
# PREPARE STAR TABLE 1 DATA
# ============================================================================

star_table1 <- star_lvad_outcomes %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, first_lvad_implant) %>%
  rename(lvad_implant_date = first_lvad_implant) %>%
  left_join(
    thoracic_data_2025q2 %>%
      select(WL_ID_CODE, GENDER, ETHCAT, INIT_AGE, INIT_WGT_KG_CALC, 
             INIT_HGT_CM_CALC, ABO, TCR_DGN, PRI_PAYMENT_TCR, INIT_DATE),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    thoracic_mcs_device_2025q2 %>%
      filter(DEVICE_TYPE == "Dischargeable VAD") %>%
      filter(VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Left") %>%
      group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
      arrange(IMPLANT_DATE) %>%
      slice(1) %>%
      ungroup() %>%
      select(WL_ID_CODE, LVAD_BRAND, VAD_BRAND),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    data_source = "OPTN STAR",
    age_at_listing = floor(INIT_AGE),
    age_at_lvad = INIT_AGE + as.numeric(difftime(lvad_implant_date, INIT_DATE, units = "days")) / 365.25,
    age_at_lvad = floor(age_at_lvad),
    sex = ifelse(GENDER == "M", "Male", "Female"),
    sex = factor(sex, levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    race = case_when(
      ETHCAT == 1 ~ "White",
      ETHCAT == 2 ~ "Black",
      ETHCAT == 4 ~ "Hispanic/Latino",
      ETHCAT == 5 ~ "Asian",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    race = factor(race, levels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic/Latino", "Asian", "Other")),
    bmi = INIT_WGT_KG_CALC / ((INIT_HGT_CM_CALC / 100) * (INIT_HGT_CM_CALC / 100)),
    bmi_categories = case_when(
      bmi < 18 ~ "Underweight",
      bmi >= 18 & bmi < 25 ~ "Normal",
      bmi >= 25 & bmi < 30 ~ "Overweight",
      bmi >= 30 ~ "Obese",
      TRUE ~ "Unknown"),
    bmi_categories = factor(bmi_categories, levels = c("Normal", "Underweight", "Overweight", "Obese", "Unknown")),
    blood_type = factor(
      case_when(
        ABO %in% c("A", "A1", "A2") ~ "A",
        ABO %in% c("A1B", "A2B") ~ "AB",
        TRUE ~ ABO)),
    diagnosis = case_when(
      TCR_DGN > 999 & TCR_DGN < 1007 ~ "Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic",
      TCR_DGN == 1007 | TCR_DGN == 1200 ~ "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN > 1048 & TCR_DGN < 1100 ~ "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN == 1203 | (TCR_DGN >= 1205 & TCR_DGN <= 1207) ~ "Congenital Heart Disease",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    diagnosis = factor(diagnosis, levels = c("Dilated Cardiomyopathy, Non-Ischemic", "Ischemic Cardiomyopathy", 
                                             "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy", "Congenital Heart Disease", "Other")),
    payor = case_when(
      PRI_PAYMENT_TCR == 1 ~ "Private",
      PRI_PAYMENT_TCR %in% c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 13) ~ "Public",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    payor = factor(payor, levels = c("Private", "Public", "Other")),
    device_brand = coalesce(VAD_BRAND, LVAD_BRAND),
    lvad_type = case_when(
      grepl("HeartMate 3|HM3|HM 3|HeartMate III", device_brand, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HeartMate 3",
      grepl("HeartMate II|HMII|HM II|HM2|HM 2", device_brand, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HeartMate II",
      grepl("HVAD|HeartWare", device_brand, ignore.case = TRUE) ~ "HVAD",
      TRUE ~ "Other"),
    lvad_type = factor(lvad_type, levels = c("HeartMate 3", "HeartMate II", "HVAD", "Other"))
  )

cat("STAR Table 1 data prepared:", nrow(star_table1), "patients\n")

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE AND CREATE TABLE 1 (NO P-VALUES)
# ============================================================================

combined_table1 <- bind_rows(
  srtr_table1 %>% select(data_source, age_at_listing, age_at_lvad, sex, race, bmi_categories, 
                         blood_type, diagnosis, payor, lvad_type),
  star_table1 %>% select(data_source, age_at_listing, age_at_lvad, sex, race, bmi_categories, 
                         blood_type, diagnosis, payor, lvad_type)
) %>%
  mutate(data_source = factor(data_source, levels = c("SRTR", "OPTN STAR")))

# Set variable labels
var_label_list <- list(
  age_at_listing = "Age at Listing (Years)",
  age_at_lvad = "Age at LVAD Implant (Years)",
  sex = "Sex",
  race = "Race/Ethnicity",
  bmi_categories = "BMI Category",
  blood_type = "Blood Type",
  diagnosis = "Primary Diagnosis",
  payor = "Insurance Type",
  lvad_type = "LVAD Device Type"
)

labelled::var_label(combined_table1) <- var_label_list

# Create table WITHOUT p-values
table1 <- combined_table1 %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = data_source,
    digits = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)),
    missing = "no"
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  modify_header(label ~ "**Characteristic**") %>%
  modify_caption("**Table 1. Baseline Characteristics of LVAD Cohorts by Data Source**") %>%
  modify_footnote(all_stat_cols() ~ "Cohorts are not independent; statistical testing not performed") %>%
  bold_labels()

print(table1)

colSums(is.na(combined_table1))

```

``` {r redo flow anlaysis}

# ============================================================================
# STAR JUSTIFICATION FLOW ANALYSIS - COMPLETE CODE
# ============================================================================

# Flow function for STAR justification data
get_star_just_lvad_flow <- function(start_date, end_date) {
  candidates_in_period <- thoracic_data_2025q2 %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE <= end_date) %>%
    filter(is.na(END_DATE) | END_DATE > start_date) %>%
    filter(INIT_AGE > 17) %>%
    dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE)
  
  candidates_with_lvad <- candidates_in_period %>%
    left_join(star_lvads_just %>% dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, first_lvad_implant), 
              by = "WL_ID_CODE")
  
  new_listings_with_lvad <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE >= start_date & INIT_DATE <= end_date) %>%
    filter(!is.na(first_lvad_implant) & first_lvad_implant <= INIT_DATE) %>%
    nrow()
  
  lvad_implants_on_waitlist <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(!is.na(first_lvad_implant)) %>%
    filter(first_lvad_implant >= start_date & first_lvad_implant <= end_date) %>%
    filter(first_lvad_implant > INIT_DATE) %>%
    nrow()
  
  total_new_listings <- candidates_with_lvad %>%
    filter(INIT_DATE >= start_date & INIT_DATE <= end_date) %>%
    nrow()
  
  return(data.frame(
    period_start = start_date,
    period_end = end_date,
    new_listings_with_lvad = new_listings_with_lvad,
    lvad_implants_on_waitlist = lvad_implants_on_waitlist,
    total_new_listings = total_new_listings
  ))
}

# Define periods for STAR justification (Jan 1, 2019 - Apr 30, 2025)
period_starts_just <- seq(mdy("01-01-2019"), mdy("03-01-2025"), by = "2 months")
period_ends_just <- period_starts_just %m+% months(2) - days(1)
period_ends_just[length(period_ends_just)] <- mdy("04-30-2025")

# Run flow analysis
star_just_flow_list <- lapply(1:length(period_starts_just), function(i) {
  get_star_just_lvad_flow(period_starts_just[i], period_ends_just[i])
})

star_just_flow_df <- bind_rows(star_just_flow_list) %>%
  mutate(
    period_label = paste(format(period_start, "%b"), format(period_end, "%b %Y"), sep = "-"),
    period_factor = factor(period_label, levels = period_label),
    pct_listed_with_lvad = (new_listings_with_lvad / total_new_listings) * 100,
    total_lvad_incidence = new_listings_with_lvad + lvad_implants_on_waitlist
  )

# ============================================================================
# FILTER SRTR AND STAR MCS TO MATCH TIMEFRAME
# ============================================================================

# Add total_lvad_incidence if not already present
if (!"total_lvad_incidence" %in% colnames(flow_results_df)) {
  flow_results_df <- flow_results_df %>%
    mutate(total_lvad_incidence = new_listings_with_lvad + lvad_implants_on_waitlist)
}

if (!"total_lvad_incidence" %in% colnames(star_flow_df)) {
  star_flow_df <- star_flow_df %>%
    mutate(total_lvad_incidence = new_listings_with_lvad + lvad_implants_on_waitlist)
}

# Filter to match justification timeframe (Jan 2019 onwards)
flow_results_df_filtered <- flow_results_df %>%
  filter(period_start >= mdy("01-01-2019"))

star_flow_df_filtered <- star_flow_df %>%
  filter(period_start >= mdy("01-01-2019"))

# ============================================================================
# COMBINE ALL THREE SOURCES
# ============================================================================

combined_flow <- bind_rows(
  flow_results_df_filtered %>%
    dplyr::select(period_start, period_end, period_label, total_lvad_incidence, 
                  new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist) %>%
    mutate(data_source = "SRTR (MCS File)"),
  star_just_flow_df %>%
    dplyr::select(period_start, period_end, period_label, total_lvad_incidence,
                  new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist) %>%
    mutate(data_source = "STAR (MCS + Status Just. Files)"),
  star_flow_df_filtered %>%
    dplyr::select(period_start, period_end, period_label, total_lvad_incidence,
                  new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist) %>%
    mutate(data_source = "STAR (MCS File)")
) %>%
  mutate(
    period_factor = factor(period_label, levels = unique(period_label)),
    data_source = factor(data_source, 
                         levels = c("SRTR (MCS File)", "STAR (MCS + Status Just. Files)", "STAR (MCS File)"))
  )

# ============================================================================
# THREE-WAY TOTAL INCIDENCE PLOT
# ============================================================================

flow_3way_plot <- ggplot(combined_flow,
                         aes(x = period_factor, y = total_lvad_incidence,
                             color = data_source, linetype = data_source,
                             group = data_source)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = data_source), size = 2.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("SRTR (MCS File)" = "coral",
                                "STAR (MCS + Status Just. Files)" = "darkgreen",
                                "STAR (MCS File)" = "steelblue")) +
  scale_linetype_manual(values = c("SRTR (MCS File)" = "solid",
                                   "STAR (MCS + Status Just. Files)" = "solid",
                                   "STAR (MCS File)" = "dashed")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("SRTR (MCS File)" = 16,
                                "STAR (MCS + Status Just. Files)" = 15,
                                "STAR (MCS File)" = 17)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    x = "Time Period",
    y = "New LVAD Candidates",
    color = "Data Source",
    linetype = "Data Source",
    shape = "Data Source"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 13)
  )

print(flow_3way_plot)

# ============================================================================
# FLOW COMPONENTS PLOT - ALL THREE DATA SOURCES
# ============================================================================

# Prepare breakdown data
flow_breakdown <- combined_flow %>%
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(new_listings_with_lvad, lvad_implants_on_waitlist),
    names_to = "component",
    values_to = "count"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    component = factor(component,
                       levels = c("new_listings_with_lvad", "lvad_implants_on_waitlist"),
                       labels = c("Listed with LVAD", "LVAD Implanted While Listed"))
  )

# Create the plot
flow_components_3way <- ggplot(flow_breakdown,
                               aes(x = period_factor, y = count,
                                   color = data_source,
                                   linetype = component,
                                   group = interaction(data_source, component))) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(aes(shape = component), size = 2.5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "SRTR (MCS File)" = "coral",
      "STAR (MCS + Status Just. Files)" = "darkgreen",
      "STAR (MCS File)" = "steelblue"
    )
  ) +
  scale_linetype_manual(
    values = c("Listed with LVAD" = "solid",
               "LVAD Implanted While Listed" = "dotted")
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c("Listed with LVAD" = 16,
               "LVAD Implanted While Listed" = 17)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    x = "Time Period",
    y = "Number of Candidates",
    color = "Data Source",
    linetype = "Event Type",
    shape = "Event Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 15) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "vertical",  # Stack legends vertically
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 15),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 15)
  ) +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(order = 1, title = "Data Source"),
    linetype = guide_legend(order = 2, title = "Event Type"),
    shape = guide_legend(order = 2, title = "Event Type")
  )
print(flow_components_3way)


```
